mapper.select:
WITH MSPDB AS (
SELECT MSP.CONTRACT_NUM ,MSP.MODEL_ID ,REQ.AGENT_CODE ,REQ.REQ_BUY_TYPE ,REQ.PROD_ID ,REQ.SYS_RDATE
FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP MSP INNER JOIN MSP_REQUEST@DL_MSP REQ ON MSP.CONTRACT_NUM = REQ.CONTRACT_NUM WHERE 1=1 AND MSP.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} ) SELECT MSPDB.CONTRACT_NUM ,MSPDB.MODEL_ID ,MSPDB.AGENT_CODE ,MSPDB.REQ_BUY_TYPE ,MSPDB.PROD_ID ,MSPDB.SYS_RDATE ,REQUEST_KEY FROM MCP_REQUEST MCP INNER JOIN MSPDB ON MCP.CONTRACT_NUM = MSPDB.CONTRACT_NUM
WHERE ROWNUM < 2
ORDER BY MSPDB.SYS_RDATE DESC ,MCP.REQUEST_KEY DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE)-TO_DATE(LST_COM_ACTV_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') > 90 THEN 'N' WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE)-TO_DATE(LST_COM_ACTV_DATE,'YYYYMMDD') <= 90 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS DAY_OVER ,SUB_LINK_NAME FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}
SELECT SOC FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO@DL_MSP WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{value} AND SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND EXPIRATION_DATE = '99991231000000' AND ROWNUM = 1

select MRR.SYS_RDATE, MRR.SYS_RDATE_DD, MRR.REQ_BUY_TYPE, DECODE(MRR.REQ_BUY_TYPE,'UU','유심 후기','MM','휴대폰 후기','-') AS REQ_BUY_EVENT_TYPE_NM, MRR.REG_NM, MJSI.DOBYYYYMMDD, MJSI.SUBSCRIBER_NO, MJSI.SUB_ADR_PRIMARY_LN, MJSI.SUB_ADR_SECONDARY_LN, DECODE(MRR.REQ_BUY_TYPE,'UU','유심','MM','휴대폰','-') AS REQ_BUY_TYPE_NM, MRR.COMMEND_YN, DECODE(MRR.COMMEND_YN, '1', '추천', '비추천')COMMEND_nm, MRR.REVIEW_SBST, (select FILE_PATH_NM from MCP_REQUEST_REVIEW_IMG img where MRR.REQUEST_KEY = img.REQUEST_KEY and IMD_SEQ = 0) IMG1, (select FILE_PATH_NM from MCP_REQUEST_REVIEW_IMG img where MRR.REQUEST_KEY = img.REQUEST_KEY and IMD_SEQ = 1) IMG2, MRR.SNS_INFO from MCP_REQUEST_REVIEW MRR, MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP MJSI where MRR.CONTRACT_NUM = MJSI.CONTRACT_NUM(+)
and TO_CHAR(MRR.SYS_RDATE, 'YYYYMM') = #{startDate}
